message.content:
1) Yes, the T-shirt has natural fabric drape, curves, and a non-blocky shape (e.g., rounded shoulders, slight torso contour).  
2) Yes, there is realistic depth, soft lighting, and subtle shading (e.g., gentle shadows under the collar/arms, gradient on the torso).  
3) 7/10 (Good 3D form, but lacks fine details).  
4) Yes, it resembles a professional e-commerce mockup (clean layout, product customization options).  
5) Missing/improvable: Subtle wrinkles (fabric looks overly smooth), more defined fabric texture (e.g., cotton weave), sharper shadows (edges are slightly soft), and minor color vibrancy (white appears slightly flat).
